MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS WHITNEY & CO., LLC, WHITNEY EQUITY PARTNERS V, LLC, AND WHITNEY V, L.P. DEMURRER TO VERIFIED COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFFS ROSEMONT ASSOCIATES, INC. AND JOSEPH P. URSO:
APPEARANCE: Jonah Dylan Mitchell, Esq. of Reed Smith Crosby Heafey LLP 659-5917 for pltfs & opposing parties; Paul Flum, Esq. Of Morrison & Foerster 268-7335 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court overruled the demurrer as to the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 6th, 7th, 8th, and 10th causes of action; sustained with leave to amend as to the 9th cause of action; and took the matter under submission as to the 11th cause of action. Pltf to prepare proposed order (& re 11th cause of action, should indicate in the alternative, overruled or sustained with leave to amend). (302/REQ/KM(EX)) Court Reporter Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
